*** 2 INJ *** NWS SURVEY CONFIRMS A 4.6 MILE TORNADO WHICH BEGAN JUST SOUTHWEST OF PLEASANT PLAIN IN CLERMONT COUNTY. THE TORNADO CAUSED WIDESPREAD DAMAGE TO LARGE TREES, HOMES AND OUTBUILDINGS WHICH INCLUDED AN INSURANCE BUILDING AND A FIRE STATION. THE TORNADO WAS EMBEDDED WITHIN A MUCH LARGER AREA OF STRAIGHT LINE WIND DAMAGE.
